title: candollea spinulosa
intro: Candollea spinulosa, also known as the spiny candollea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Icacinaceae. Native to Australia, it is a shrub-like plant that has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Aboriginal medicine. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, candollea spinulosa is often used in teas, infusions, and topical applications, such as ointments and creams, to harness its medicinal benefits.
